GroupPlan.title: Other group/employer coverage
GroupPlan.retentionScript: That’s great you have coverage through work. One thing to remember is that employer insurance usually ends if you change jobs. This policy stays with you no matter where you work— Would you like to keep the coverage, or is this cancellation final?

IndivPlan.title: Other individual insurance
IndivPlan.retentionScript: It’s smart to look at alternatives. Just keep in mind, this policy is designed to work alongside other coverage to help with costs your new plan may not cover. Would you like me to connect you with our sales team to compare options? Or should we proceed with the cancellation?

Benefits.title: Benefits not what expected
Benefits.retentionScript: I understand if the benefits don’t feel like a fit. I can connect you with our sales team who can review your options and see if there’s a plan that better meets your needs— Would you like to keep the coverage, or is this cancellation final?

Cost.title: Cost of policy
Cost.retentionScript: I understand the cost can feel heavy. Rather than losing coverage completely, we can connect you with a broker to explore ways to adjust your plan so it’s more manageable— Would you like to keep the coverage, or is this cancellation final?

DontWant.title: Not wanting the coverage anymore
DontWant.retentionScript: I understand you’d like to cancel. Just keep in mind that medical costs can add up quickly, even with regular insurance. This coverage is here to help protect you and your family from those unexpected bills— Would you like to keep the coverage, or is this cancellation final?

Medicaid.title: Coverage through Medicaid
Medicaid.retentionScript: Medicaid is helpful, but it doesn’t cover everything. This plan is designed to step in where Medicaid stops, so you’re not left with uncovered costs or lost income— is this cancellation final, or would you like to keep the coverage?

Medicare.title: Coverage through Medicare
Medicare.retentionScript: Medicare is a strong foundation, but there are still gaps it doesn’t cover. Supplemental coverage can help fill those gaps so you’re better protected— is this cancellation final, or would you like to keep the coverage?

Other.title: Other
Other.retentionScript: This is actually a great supplementary health plan that provides extra protection for unexpected medical costs. Before we proceed, can I confirm— is this cancellation final, or would you like to keep the coverage?

Death.title: Death
Death.retentionScript: generate empathy message. proceed to disclaimer.
